name: dco-b
description: Fix a PR that fails DCO check because the sign-off email doesn't match the commit author email.

setup.repo_state: branch with commit signed off with wrong email
setup.error_message: DCO check failed — Commit abc5678: Signed-off-by email (wrong@example.com) doesn't match author (correct@example.com)

expected_outcome.avoids_dead_end: don't just amend --signoff again (same wrong email)

measures: Whether agent retrieves prior DCO lesson and adapts it to email mismatch variant
